ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_num" INTEGER /* Flight number */,
  "dep_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "dep_city" TEXT /* Departure city */,
  "arrival_city" TEXT /* Arrival city */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (domestic, international) */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number for boarding and arrival */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "twitter_account" TEXT /* Twitter account of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the passenger account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to reach the next tier in the loyalty program */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Current tier of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_loyalty" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "sky_mile_number" INTEGER /* Sky mile number of the passenger */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the passenger joined the loyalty program */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total loyalty points accumulated by the passenger */,
  "last_point_added_date" TEXT /* Date the last point was added to the loyalty account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_passengers" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the passenger */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Boarding time of the passenger */,
  "check_in_status" TEXT /* Status of the passenger's check-in */,
  "baggage_claim" TEXT /* Baggage claim information */,
  "meal_preference" TEXT /* Meal preference of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id", "passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Arrival date of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight schedule */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number for boarding and arrival */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number for the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code (e.g., ATL, MSP) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_airports" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "departure_or_arrival" TEXT /* Whether the airport is the departure or arrival airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id", "airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_notifications_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_time" TEXT /* Time the flight was delayed */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time after the delay */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the delay information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

Date of birth of the passenger
Date the passenger account was created

Points required to reach the next tier in the loyalty program
